email.text:
Weekly Objective Update — Beta Payments Core — Week 13

SUMMARY
- On track: 2/6
- At risk: 2 (1 red, 1 yellow)
- Not started: 0
- Done: 2
- Missing updates: 0
- Blockers / risks: 2

Hi team,

Please find the latest objective health report.

OBJECTIVE UPDATES
Sorted by status: on track, at risk, delayed, not started, missing, done.

[ON TRACK] Q1 2026 [March]: Service topology drift alarm (march-2026)
Leader Engineer: Wren Nkemi
Progress: 67% | Due: 31 Mar
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2603-02
Done this week: Feature flag is enabled for internal cohorts; watching latency and error rate.
Plan for next week: Wrap the last integration test and hand off to QA.

[ON TRACK] Q1 2026 [March]: Config drift auto-repair (march-2026)
Leader Engineer: Bram Okonjo
Progress: 80% | Due: 31 Mar
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2603-05
Done this week: Landed 3 of 5 PRs; last two under review with a partner team.
Plan for next week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.

[AT RISK] Q1 2026 [March]: Golden-path SLO board (march-2026)
Leader Engineer: Bram Okonjo
Progress: 53% | Due: 31 Mar
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2603-06
Done this week: Scope grew after user testing; trimming to hit the reduced target.
Plan for next week: Reduce scope to the top-2 use cases and land a partial fix.

[DELAYED] Q1 2026 [March]: Rate-limiter fairness audit (march-2026)
Leader Engineer: Tomo Delacroix
Progress: 16% | Due: 31 Mar
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2603-04
Done this week: Legal review outstanding — no code path until the sign-off lands.
Plan for next week: Pick up a related workstream while the primary path stays blocked.

[DONE] Q1 2026 [March]: Warm-cache eviction policy (march-2026)
Leader Engineer: Rio Vasquez
Progress: 100% | Due: 31 Mar
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2603-01
Done this week: Closed the final ticket in the epic and archived the working doc.
Plan for next week: Hand off to the on-call rotation and close the epic.

[DONE] Q1 2026 [March]: Deprecation channel rollout (march-2026)
Leader Engineer: Rio Vasquez
Progress: 100% | Due: 31 Mar
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2603-03
Done this week: Landed the migration cutover; no incidents in the follow-up window.
Plan for next week: Monitor for the next 2 weeks; no active work planned.

BLOCKERS / RISKS
- [Blocker] Q1 2026 [March]: Rate-limiter fairness audit: Infra migration blocking rollout; owner: platform.
  Leader Engineer: Tomo Delacroix | Owner: Tomo Delacroix | Days open: n/a
- [Risk] Q1 2026 [March]: Golden-path SLO board: Design review pending from the sibling team.
  Leader Engineer: Bram Okonjo | Owner: Bram Okonjo | Days open: n/a

Kind Regards
Engineering Manager
